Norsk Industri

https://www.norskindustri.no/
Avvik: 184 | Bestått: 164
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/ulsteinvik11.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/ulsteinvik11.j
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/img_3750.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/img_3750.jpg?mode=
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/49991.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/49991.jpg?mode=crop&a
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="start-page skin-industri"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=8&conten
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-caret-right"></i> Aktuelle saker fra Norsk Industri:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/bransjer/maritim/aktuelt/maritim-verdiskapingsrapport-2026-maritim-industri-langt-over-forventning/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalass
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/kompetanse/aktuelt/her-er-norgesmesterne-i-industrifag/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/img_
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/nye-opplysningskrav-til-tollmyndighetene-ved-frakt-gjennom-finland-og-sverige-nvit-regler/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalass
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

EPD-generator for møbler

https://www.norskindustri.no/kurs-og-arrangementer/arrangement/2026/q1/brukerwebinarfordesignindustriensepd-generatorformobler/
Avvik: 177 | Bestått: 150
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn btn--primary event-info__signup" href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/epd-generator-for-moebler/register" target="_blank"> Meld deg på
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (170 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=1318&content.link=744137&content.category=342&content.type.category=2534&content.tags
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

HMS-kurs i Norsk Industri

https://www.norskindustri.no/kurs-og-arrangementer/kurs-hms/hms-kurs-i-norsk-industri/
Avvik: 176 | Bestått: 168
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 style="text-align: center;">Har du spørsmål om kurs og kompetanse?</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (115 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="/kurs-og-arrangementer/kurs-hms/hms-kurs-i-norsk-industri/hms-grunnkurs-lovpalagt/"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> HMS Grunnkurs arbeidsmiljø</spa
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (141 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="/kurs-og-arrangementer/kurs-hms/hms-kurs-i-norsk-industri/praktisk-hms-oppfolging-for-arbeidsledere/"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Praktisk HMS-
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="editor-link editor-link--external" href="https://norskindustri.pureservice.com/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">henvendelsessystem</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'skillelinje' appears 2 times

id="skillelinje"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=33&content.link=30644&content.category=&content.type.category=292&content.tags=HMS-ku
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Kurs og arrangement

https://www.norskindustri.no/kurs-og-arrangementer/?c=ni-hms-og-ia
Avvik: 184 | Bestått: 205
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (176 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=1083&content.link=27853&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Arbeidsliv

https://www.norskindustri.no/dette-jobber-vi-med/arbeidsliv/
Avvik: 181 | Bestått: 169
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/12/adobestock_1307981344.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/12/ad
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/4/l10824093.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/4/l10824093.jpg?mod
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/4/49710.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/4/49710.jpg?mode=crop&a
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-item__heading"> <a href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/okonomi/aktuelt/norsk-industris-medlemsundersokelse-krevende-ar-for-industrien/">Norsk Industris medlemsundersøkelse: Krevende år for i
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW189664154 BCX0">Ønsker du å bli med i Reisebedriftsgruppen i Norsk Industri? </span></h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (10 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/okonomi/aktuelt/norsk-industris-medlemsundersokelse-krevende-ar-for-industrien/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalass
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/hms-og-ia/aktuelt/lanserer-varig-satsing-pa-dysleksivennlig-arbeidsplass-dva/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/4/l1
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/internasjonalt/aktuelt/april-2025-hva-skjer-i-eu/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/4/49710.jpg?
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/arbeidsliv/ambod---verktoy-for-arbeidsgivere/" tabindex="-1"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://arbinn.nho.no/" tabindex="-1"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til Arbinn'

<a class="nho-button" href="https://arbinn.nho.no/"> <span>Gå til Arbinn</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/arbeidsliv/arbeidsgiverpolitikk/" tabindex="-1"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til plattformen'

<a class="nho-button" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/arbeidsliv/arbeidsgiverpolitikk/"> <span>Gå til plattformen</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (162 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=35&content.link=184409&content.category=1640&content.type.category=&content.tags=" st
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

https://nhoid.nho.no/core/login?signin=c820cc4e6051ec4b6d2e39b5901bbed0
Avvik: 4 | Bestått: 13
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body> <div class="aria-hide"> <ul> <li><a href="#content" tabindex="-1">Hopp til innhold</a></li> </ul> </div> <header class="nav-portal"> <div class="nav-portal-bar"> <div class="container"> <div cl
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2><i class="icon ion-locked"></i> Logg inn </h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'username' missing autocomplete attribute

<input autofocus="" id="username" maxlength="100" name="username" ng-model="model.username" placeholder="Username" required="" type="text"/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Kurs i fasilitering av læringsgrupper

https://www.norskindustri.no/kurs-og-arrangementer/arrangement/2026/q1/kurs-i-fasilitering-av-laringsgrupper/
Avvik: 177 | Bestått: 152
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn btn--primary event-info__signup" href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/kurs-i-fasilitering-av-laeringsgrupper---hop-2/register" target="_blank"> Me
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (170 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=1318&content.link=737430&content.category=288&content.type.category=296&content.tags=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

HMS og IA

https://www.norskindustri.no/hms-og-ia/
Avvik: 192 | Bestått: 204
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/1/skjermbilde-2026-01-29-144817.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/12/hms-mote-november-2025.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/12/hm
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/11/kvinnehelse_aker-solutions_2-002.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Norsk Industris HMS-statistikk</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-item__heading"> <a href="/hms-og-ia/aktuelt/arbeidstilsynet-ny-rapport-om-sveisearbeid/">Arbeidstilsynet: Ny rapport om sveisearbeid</a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (20 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="nho-button" href="/hms-og-ia/hms-statistikk/"> <span></span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/hms-og-ia/ia-bransjeprogram-i-olje--og-gassnaringen/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Fagopplæring i Norsk Industri

https://www.norskindustri.no/dette-jobber-vi-med/kompetanse/fagopplaring-i-norsk-industri/
Avvik: 179 | Bestått: 172
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 style="text-align: center;">Har du spørsmål om kurs og kompetanse?</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Kjøp trykte fagbøker!Vi tilbyr en rekke bøker innen fagopplæring. Klikk for å gå til bestillingsskjema.'

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/bestillingsskjema-boeker/register" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Kjøp trykte fagbøker!<
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/bestillingsskjema-boeker/register" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Kjøp trykte fagbøker!<
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Ønsker du E-bøker?Vi har også endel fagbøker som e-bøker. Klikk her for å finne ut mer.'

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/kompetanse/fagopplaring-i-norsk-industri/e-boker-hos-brettboka.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Ønsker du E
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/kompetanse/fagopplaring-i-norsk-industri/e-boker-hos-brettboka.no" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Ønsker du E

MODERATE

<a href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/bestillingsskjema-elaering/register" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">Bestill kurspakke(r)</span> </div> <span class="ph-l

<a href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/bestillingsskjema-elaering-opplaeringskontor/register" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">For opplæringskontor</span> <span

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=35&content.link=31484&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style="
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Bransjer

https://www.norskindustri.no/bransjer/
Avvik: 178 | Bestått: 176
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 style="text-align: center;">Norsk Industri er NHOs største landsforening med over 3 000 bedrifter med rundt 142 000 ansatte.</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/medlemskap-og-fordeler/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/bilder/illustrasjon/kalkulator.jpg?wid
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="http://legacyweb.nho.no/innmelding/?foroenr=60003" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteasse
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til skjema'

<a class="nho-button" href="http://legacyweb.nho.no/innmelding/?foroenr=60003" target="_blank"> <span>Gå til skjema</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="http://legacyweb.nho.no/innmelding/?foroenr=60003" target="_blank"> <span>Gå til skjema</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (167 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=35&content.link=28935&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style="
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

SERIOUS

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.nho.no/regionforeninger/"> <span> Alle regionkontor </span> </a>

Energi og klima Norsk Industri

https://www.norskindustri.no/dette-jobber-vi-med/energi-og-klima/
Avvik: 183 | Bestått: 193
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/img_3163.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/img_3163.jpg?mode=
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/12/img_3774.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/12/img_3774.jpg?mod
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/12/img_2023.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/12/img_2023.jpg?mod
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 style="text-align: center;">Aktuelt:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (12 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/energi-og-klima/aktuelt/ny-rapport-viser-sterk-norsk-leverandorposisjon-i-et-skjerpet-globalt-havvindmarked/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" l
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/energi-og-klima/aktuelt/norsk-industri-har-et-betydelig-enok-potensial-som-ikke-realiseres/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/energi-og-klima/aktuelt/norsk-fornybarsatsing-stopper-opp--kan-fa-store-konsekvenser-for-norsk-industri/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loadi
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/energi-og-klima/fornybar-energi-til-havs/leveransemodeller-for-havvind/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <figure> <picture> <
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til prosjektsiden'

<a class="nho-button" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/energi-og-klima/fornybar-energi-til-havs/leveransemodeller-for-havvind/" target="_blank"> <span>Gå til prosjektsiden</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i c
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/energi-og-klima/fornybar-energi-til-havs/leveransemodeller-for-havvind/" target="_blank"> <span>Gå til prosjektsiden</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/energi-og-klima/energy-transition-norway/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/energi-og-klima/veikart-for-prosessindustriens-so2-utslipp/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" sr
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til veikartet'

<a class="nho-button" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/energi-og-klima/veikart-for-prosessindustriens-so2-utslipp/"> <span>Gå til veikartet</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"><
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/om-norsk-industri/vare-ansatte/marit-holtermann-foss2/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'skillelinje' appears 2 times

id="skillelinje"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (162 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=35&content.link=29263&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style="
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Kurs og arrangement

https://www.norskindustri.no/kurs-og-arrangementer/?c=ni-mobel
Avvik: 184 | Bestått: 191
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (176 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=1083&content.link=27853&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

The Federation of Norwegian Industries

https://www.norskindustri.no/om-norsk-industri/in-english/
Avvik: 172 | Bestått: 164
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6><a class="editor-link editor-link--download" href="/siteassets/dokumenter/administrasjon/by-laws-federations-norwegian-industries-2022.pdf" title="By-laws-federations-norwegian-industries-2022.pdf
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/om-norsk-industri/vare-ansatte/cathrine-westlie-eidal/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (164 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=33&content.link=31504&content.category=&content.type.category=292&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Styret og lederforum

https://www.norskindustri.no/om-norsk-industri/styre-og-representantskap/
Avvik: 172 | Bestått: 154
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Norsk Industris styre</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="editor-link editor-link--download" href="/siteassets/dokumenter/administrasjon/etiske-retningslinjer-for-norsk-industri---vedtatt-av-styret-14.11.2023.pdf" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><sp
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (164 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=33&content.link=29329&content.category=&content.type.category=292&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Kontakt oss

https://www.norskindustri.no/om-norsk-industri/kontakt-oss/
Avvik: 178 | Bestått: 152
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="site-footer__column-heading"> Norsk Industri </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="editor-link editor-link--external" href="https://norskindustri.pureservice.com/login" rel="noopener" target="_blank">henvendelsesskjema</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (170 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=33&content.link=29339&content.category=&content.type.category=292&content.tags=" styl
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Internasjonalt

https://www.norskindustri.no/dette-jobber-vi-med/internasjonalt/
Avvik: 176 | Bestått: 162
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/adobestock_842603139.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/adobe
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/1/img_0208.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/1/img_0208.jpg?mode=
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/1/img_2785.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/1/img_2785.jpg?mode=
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="/siteassets/dokumenter/horinger-og-notater/2025-05-15-eos-notat-arne-melchior-nupi-guri-rosen-uio.pdf" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">Guri Rosen, UiO og Arne Melc
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/internasjonalt/aktuelt/nytt-europeisk-ravareinitiativ/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/adobe
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/internasjonalt/aktuelt/eu-og-trump--na-er-det-alvor/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/1/img_020
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/dette-jobber-vi-med/internasjonalt/aktuelt/eus-tollunion--er-det-mulig-for-norge-a-bli-med/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/foto
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'skillelinje' appears 2 times

id="skillelinje"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (162 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=35&content.link=29294&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style="

Medlemskap og fordeler

https://www.norskindustri.no/medlemskap-og-fordeler/
Avvik: 191 | Bestått: 210
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (22 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://arbinn.nho.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Finn ut mer her</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nho.no/medlemskap/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><strong>medlemsfordeler.</strong></a>

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)

Norsk Industri

https://www.norskindustri.no/
Avvik: 184 | Bestått: 164
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/ulsteinvik11.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/ulsteinvik11.j
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/img_3750.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/img_3750.jpg?mode=
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/49991.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/49991.jpg?mode=crop&a
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="start-page skin-industri"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=8&conten
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--bold"> <i class="ph-light ph-caret-right"></i> Aktuelle saker fra Norsk Industri:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/nye-opplysningskrav-til-tollmyndighetene-ved-frakt-gjennom-finland-og-sverige-nvit-regler/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalass

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Fagutvalg

https://www.norskindustri.no/om-norsk-industri/fagutvalg/
Avvik: 178 | Bestått: 147
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="site-footer__column-heading"> Norsk Industri </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (135 characters)

<a href="/om-norsk-industri/fagutvalg/arbeidsmedisinsk-utvalg/"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">Arbeidsmedisinsk utvalg</span> <span class="block-links-item-text">Undergruppe til HMS-utval
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (101 characters)

<a href="/om-norsk-industri/fagutvalg/hms-utvalg/"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">HMS-utvalg</span> <span class="block-links-item-text">Skal jobbe med å øke sikkerheten og forebygge perso
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (132 characters)

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (164 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=35&content.link=29610&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style="
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Digitale læremidler for vgs

https://www.norskindustri.no/kurs-og-arrangementer/digitale-laremidler-vgs/digitale-laremidler-for-vgs/
Avvik: 177 | Bestått: 154
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 style="text-align: left;">Ønsker du tilgang for din skole?</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 style="text-align: center;">Har du spørsmål om kurs og kompetanse?</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1></h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="editor-link editor-link--external" href="https://norskindustri.pureservice.com/login?ReturnUrl=%2f#/categories/19/new" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Opprett bruker og skaff tilgang</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="editor-link editor-link--external" href="https://brettboka.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Bestill e-bøker (brettboka.no)</a>

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=35&content.link=48862&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style="
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

SERIOUS

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (1 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 1 pages]
Avvik: 9 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute (×1 across article pages)

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=1731957653799480&ev=PageView&noscript=1" style="display:none" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1 (×1 across article pages)

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5 (×2 across article pages)

<h5>Norgesmestre i automatisering (lag)</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label (×1 across article pages)

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/NorskIndust
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×3 across article pages)

<a class="menu-link" href="/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer' (×1 across article pages)

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/om-norsk-industri/vare-ansatte/henriette-c.-piene-gronvold">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order (×1 across article pages)

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute (×1 across article pages)

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-PZM42V&content.type.id=33&content.link=745244&content.category=327&content.type.category=289,343&content.tag
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container (×169 across article pages)

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.nho.no/regionforeninger/"> <span> Alle regionkontor </span> </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://norskindustri.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://norskindustri.no --max-pages 21 --format html
